system.flavor: Send a pulse of earth aether downwards, causing tectonic upheaval.
system.effect:
Object yourself or a character in range. At the end of that target's next turn, the ground beneath them erupts. Create a height 1 (4+) 2, or (6+) 3 spire object under them, then push other adjacent characters 1.
Dominant may reverse this effect, lowering terrain under your target by one, (4+) two, or (6+) three spaces instead of creating an object.
